scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.dev:electron:verbose: npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron . --dev
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run copy-ffmpeg && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run copy-ffmpeg && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run copy-ffmpeg && electron-builder --mac -c.mac.artifactName='${productName}-${version}-ARM64-mac.${ext}' --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && npm run copy-ffmpeg && electron-builder --mac --x64 -c.mac.artifactName='${productName}-${version}-INTEL-mac.${ext}' --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run copy-ffmpeg && electron-builder --win --publish never
